_template_description: Hero rise structure — from underdog moment to victory lap. For Rocky, Arcane, Steven Universe, any 'they come back' arc.

concept.one_sentence: Defeat, resolve, training, comeback, victory — cut across fandoms so each beat is a different hero.

acts.name: defeat
acts.notes: Heroes down. Slow motion, muted colors.

acts.name: resolve
acts.notes: Internal decision. Quiet moments of clarity.

acts.name: comeback
acts.notes: First major win. Drop lands here.
